tools.name: Claude Code CLI
tools.purpose: Primary agent runtime. Invoked by harness for each phase (planner, generator, evaluator sessions). Supports --permission-mode, stdin prompt piping, and MCP integrations.
tools.notes: All invocations go through run-claude-safe.sh wrapper for retry logic.

tools.name: Telegram Bot API
tools.purpose: Optional notification and response channel. Used by notify.sh and telegram-poll.sh. Human responses injected as human-response.md.
tools.notes: OPTIONAL — harness works without it. Transport is interchangeable (Telegram/WhatsApp/local UI).

tools.name: Playwright MCP
tools.purpose: Used by evaluator agent to interact with running applications. Tests live UI rather than reading code. Part of the builder/verifier separation.
tools.usage: Loaded as MCP server in evaluator agent sessions
tools.notes: Only used in EVALUATE phase. Requires dev server running (ensure-dev-server.sh checks this).
